title: hohenbergia penduliflora
intro: Hohenbergia penduliflora, also known as the pendulous bromeliad, is a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hohenbergia penduliflora include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by boiling the leaves in water or using them in teas to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
